title: Autonomous Guardians: The Future of Smart Contract Auditing - DeFi Security Summit 2025
description:
Speaker: Andrei Dobra, Full-Stack Engineer, Nethermind - Kirill Balakhanov, Head of AI Products, Nethermind
Discover AuditAgent, an autonomous security auditor designed to uncover vulnerabilities in smart contracts with speed and precision. Next, step into AgentArena, which takes this a step further, an open battleground where multiple security agents compete for bounties and push automated security to broader scale and deeper coverage. This workshop reveals how autonomous systems are reshaping the future of blockchain security.


About DSS
Every year, DSS brings together top minds in blockchain, auditing, and security — from white-hat hackers and protocol developers to academic researchers and industry leaders. The goal? To tackle the most pressing issues in DeFi security head-on — from smart contract exploits and cross-chain vulnerabilities to governance threats and beyond.

https://defisecuritysummit.org/
